# Onpoint Automation

## About
Onpoint Automation is a Control4 Platinum dealer specialising in smart home automation. Based in Raymond Terrace, NSW, Australia, we service the Newcastle, Hunter Valley, Lake Macquarie, Port Stephens, Maitland, and Cessnock regions.

## Services
- Home Automation (Control4 smart home systems)
- Smart Lighting (automated indoor and outdoor lighting)
- Multi-Room Audio/Video (whole-home entertainment)
- Security & Access Control (cameras, smart locks, intercoms)
- IT Networking (enterprise-grade home networks)
- Home Theatre Design & Installation
- Motorised TV Lifters
- Hi-Fi Systems

## Service Area
- Newcastle, NSW
- Lake Macquarie, NSW
- Maitland, NSW
- Port Stephens, NSW
- Hunter Valley, NSW
- Cessnock, NSW
- Merewether, NSW
- Nelson Bay, NSW
- Charlestown, NSW
- Pokolbin, NSW
